content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/utils/components/SSHAccess/components/ConsoleOverVirtctl.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 44
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-disabled-color-100' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100

Code context:
```
   43        <DescriptionListTerm className="pf-v5-u-font-size-xs">
   44          <Text className="pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100">
   45            {t('SSH using virtctl')}{' '}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 43
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   42      <DescriptionListGroup className="pf-v5-c-description-list__group">
   43        <DescriptionListTerm className="pf-v5-u-font-size-xs">
   44          <Text className="pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100">

```

### Fix 3
Line: 23
Rule [sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Popover is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Popover renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Popover may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Popover
  localName: Popover
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
   22    GridItem,
   23    Popover,
   24    Text,

```

### Fix 4
Line: 44
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-u-disabled-color-100]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-u-disabled-color-100' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100

Code context:
```
   43        <DescriptionListTerm className="pf-v5-u-font-size-xs">
   44          <Text className="pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100">
   45            {t('SSH using virtctl')}{' '}

```

### Fix 5
Line: 24
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: Text
  localName: Text
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
   23    Popover,
   24    Text,
   25  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/utils/components/SSHAccess/components/ConsoleOverVirtctl.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 & Fix 4** (both about the same thing): Line 44 - `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` CSS class was removed. Need to remove this class. Since it's the only class on `<Text>`, the className prop should be removed entirely.

**Fix 5**: Line 24 - Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>`. The `<Text>` component on line 44 wraps text content and a Popover with HelpIcon. I need to replace `Text` with `Content` in both the import and usage.

**Fix 2**: Line 43 - `DescriptionListTerm` icon should be passed via `icon` prop. Looking at line 43-79, the `DescriptionListTerm` contains a `<Text>` (which becomes `<Content>`) with text and a Popover/HelpIcon inside. The HelpIcon here is inside a Popover trigger, not a standalone icon for the DescriptionListTerm. This rule is about icons that are direct children of DescriptionListTerm. Looking more carefully, the HelpIcon is nested inside `<Popover>` which is inside `<Text>`/`<Content>` which is inside `<DescriptionListTerm>`. There's no direct icon child of DescriptionListTerm here. The fix doesn't seem directly applicable in the traditional sense - there's no standalone icon to move.

**Fix 3**: Line 23 - Popover behavioral change regarding appendTo default. This is a test-related advisory. Since there are no test files listed, this is informational. The Popover usage itself doesn't need code changes unless tests break.

Let me check for companion test files:

No test files found. Now let me apply all fixes:

**Fix 1 & Fix 4** (same issue): Remove `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` class from line 44. Since it's the only className on `<Text>`, remove the entire `className` prop.

**Fix 5**: Replace `Text` → `Content` in import and JSX usage.

**Fix 2**: The `DescriptionListTerm` on line 43 contains a `<Text>` (becoming `<Content>`) which has text and a `<Popover>` with `<HelpIcon>` inside. The HelpIcon is NOT a direct icon child of DescriptionListTerm — it's a Popover trigger deeply nested. This rule doesn't apply in a meaningful way here since there's no standalone icon to extract.

**Fix 3**: Advisory about Popover's appendTo default change. No code change needed in the component itself — only tests would be affected, and there are no test files.

Let me now apply the changes:

- Import: Replace `Text` with `Content`
- Line 44: Replace `<Text className="pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100">` with `<Content>` (remove dead CSS class, rename component)
- Line 78: Replace `</Text>` with `</Content>`
Now let me verify the final state of the file:

The file looks correct. All changes are applied cleanly.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` | ✅ Applied | Removed the `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` className from the `<Text>` (now `<Content>`) element on line 44. The class was removed entirely since there is no v6 equivalent. |
| **Fix 2** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm` | ⏭ No change needed | The `HelpIcon` on line 76 is not a direct icon child of `DescriptionListTerm` — it is nested inside a `<Popover>` trigger within a `<Content>` wrapper. This is a Popover interaction pattern, not an icon-in-term pattern, so the `icon` prop migration does not apply here. |
| **Fix 3** | `sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes` | ⏭ No change needed | This is a test advisory about Popover's `appendTo` default changing from `'inline'` to `() => document.body`. No companion test files exist for this component, so no code changes are required. |
| **Fix 4** | `semver-css-class-removed-u-disabled-color-100` | ✅ Applied | Same class as Fix 1 — the `pf-v5-u-disabled-color-100` className was removed (applied together with Fix 1). |
| **Fix 5** | `semver-text-component-import-deprecated` | ✅ Applied | Replaced `Text` → `Content` in the import statement (line 24) and in both JSX tags (open tag line 44, close tag line 78). |
